HERO_TAGLINE: Mabilis, Matapat, at Maaasahang Tubero sa Parañaque
SERVICE_1_DESC: Rapid response diagnostic and repairs for bursting or leaking pipes across NCR.
SERVICE_2_DESC: Eco-friendly, mechanical declogging without damaging your residential drainage systems.
SERVICE_3_DESC: Safe setup of multi-point and single-point bathroom heating systems.
SERVICE_4_DESC: Installation, preventative maintenance, and motor rewinding for home booster pumps.
SERVICE_5_DESC: Commercial and residential grease trap cleaning for food businesses and kitchens.
SERVICE_6_DESC: Whole-house replacement from old rusted galvanized pipes to premium PPR pipelines.
ABOUT_TEXT: Kanto Plumbing began on a neighborhood street corner in BF Homes, Parañaque. We realized local families were tired of hard-to-reach, unreliable services. Today, we bring expert, licensed plumbing solutions straight to your doorstep with honest pricing and zero shortcuts.
AREA_CITIES: BF Homes, Don Bosco, Sun Valley, Moonwalk, San Antonio, Marcelo Green, Baclaran, Tambo, Sto. Niño
GALLERY_SUBTITLE: See our real, completed projects and local installations in Parañaque.
TESTIMONIAL_1_QUOTE: Mabilis dumating nung nagkaroon kami ng tagas sa banyo hatinggabi. Very professional at malinis magtrabaho!
TESTIMONIAL_2_QUOTE: Highly recommended! Sila lang ang nakahanap ng leak sa ilalim ng sahig namin na matagal nang problema.
TESTIMONIAL_3_QUOTE: Subok na maaasahan. Clear ang quotation bago simulan ang gawa, walang sorpresang extra charges.
